name: Apple & Prune Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1250 grams (2 pounds, 11 ounces) prunes, washed and chopped
450 grams (1 pound) onions, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
Delicious with pork, ham or cheese.
About 6 cups
Bring all the ingredients to a boil in a fairly large pan. Reduce heat. Simmer (with a lid on the pan) for approximately 2 hours. When the mixture is thick enough, pour the chutney into sterilized jars and close them immediately.
